mapper.select: SELECT id, question, answer, category, sort_order as sortOrder FROM ai_faq WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_faq
AND question LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_faq (question, answer, category, sort_order, status) VALUES (#{question}, #{answer}, #{category}, #{sortOrder}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_faq SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
